name: Sirf Tum
overview: Though Hanan and Abeer reluctantly start their new life together, their past traumas continue to haunt them. The question remains: will Hanan and Abeer be able to overcome their past and find love for each other? Or will their differences and past experiences lead to further conflict and separation?

trailers.title: Sirf Tum | Starting from 19th July | Ft. Anmol Baloch, Hamza Sohail, Mohsin Abbas Haider
